next_steps: Send serum thyroid function panel including TSH, free T4, and T3
Send serum and CSF paraneoplastic and autoimmune encephalitis panels (specifically anti-NMDA receptor antibodies)
Perform continuous video EEG monitoring to rule out non-convulsive status epilepticus
Monitor for autonomic instability and initiate supportive measures including aggressive hydration
Consult endocrinology for evaluation of hyperthyroid history
Consider trial of plasmapheresis or IVIG if autoimmune etiology is highly suspected despite initial workup

differential_diagnoses: Hashimoto's encephalopathy (Steroid-responsive encephalopathy associated with autoimmune thyroiditis)
next_steps: Obtain emergent thyroid function tests (TSH, free T4, free T3) and thyroid peroxidase (TPO) antibodies
Send serum and CSF autoimmune/paraneoplastic encephalitis panels, including anti-NMDA receptor antibodies
Order serum and urine porphyrin and porphobilinogen studies
Initiate continuous video EEG monitoring to rule out subclinical seizure activity
Review medication history for potential drug-drug interactions or recent exposures contributing to encephalopathy
Perform trial of high-dose intravenous corticosteroids if TPO antibodies are positive and other etiologies are ruled out
